# EuroOilWatch

> Live EU fuel reserve tracking, price monitoring, and AI-powered energy security analysis across 27 European countries.

EuroOilWatch is an independent transparency dashboard that tracks fuel reserves, pump prices, and crude oil market data across the European Union's 27 member states. It presents official EU data in a clear, accessible format for policymakers, journalists, researchers, and the public.

## Key Data

- Oil stock levels for 27 EU countries (petrol, diesel, jet fuel) — source: Eurostat nrg_stk_oilm
- Days of supply calculation vs 90-day EU mandatory minimum (Directive 2009/119/EC)
- Weekly consumer fuel prices from the EC Weekly Oil Bulletin (DG Energy)
- Brent crude oil benchmark price
- AI-generated energy security analysis updated daily

## Current Situation (March 2026)

- EU average petrol reserves: ~105 days (above 90-day minimum)
- EU average diesel reserves: ~93 days (barely above minimum)
- 11 EU countries below the 90-day mandatory minimum for diesel
- Germany diesel reserves: 64 days (critical)
- Italy diesel reserves: 64 days (critical)
- EU average petrol price: €1.783/litre
- EU average diesel price: €1.965/litre
- Brent crude: ~$107/barrel
- Prices up ~26% since January 2026 due to Strait of Hormuz disruption

## Pages

- [Dashboard](https://eurooilwatch.com): Main dashboard with reserve gauges, prices, AI analysis, and country overview
- [Prices](https://eurooilwatch.com/prices): EU fuel price comparison across 27 countries
- [Methodology](https://eurooilwatch.com/methodology): Data sources, calculation methods, and limitations
- [About](https://eurooilwatch.com/about): About the project and contact information
- Country pages: /country/{code} for each EU member state (e.g., /country/de for Germany, /country/fr for France)

## Data Sources

- Eurostat: Monthly oil stock levels (nrg_stk_oilm) and supply data (nrg_cb_oilm)
- European Commission DG Energy: Weekly Oil Bulletin consumer prices
- Yahoo Finance: Brent crude oil futures (BZ=F)
- Anthropic Claude: AI-generated analysis

## API

Data is available as JSON at:
- /data/stocks.json — Oil stock levels by country
- /data/prices.json — Fuel prices by country
- /data/brent.json — Brent crude price
- /data/analysis.json — AI-generated analysis

## Contact

- Email: admin@eurooilwatch.com
- Website: https://eurooilwatch.com
